metadata.title: Death Rates Medical Cause metadata
metadata.description: Analysis of infant death Statistics in respect of GNCTD for year 2024
metadata.data_source: Civil Registration System (CRS) - Infant death data and maternal death data registration records with medically certified cause of death
metadata.key_statistics: Vital Statistics related to Infant Deaths
metadata.remarks: Based on CRS registered deaths with medically certified causes; completeness depends on MCCD coverage and registration quality
